title: Junior Business Development Manager at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
